subparts.text: How can integration of security practices into early stages of SDLC influence post-deployment software maintenance efforts?
List any four security principles for secure software development.
Explain the importance of requirements prioritization in secure software requirements engineering.
What is the significance of threat modeling in secure design?
What is the purpose of the CWE database?
Why is the use of magic URLs discouraged in secure software implementations?
Why is memory management crucial for secure coding?
What is the significance of version control in secure coding?

questions.question_text: Discuss the challenges organizations might face when transitioning from a traditional SDLC to Microsoft SDL.
Discuss the Seven Touchpoints of Software Security and their significance in the software development lifecycle.
Describe the role of "Misuse" and "Abuse" cases in identifying security requirements. Why is collaboration between designers and security engineers essential during requirement analysis?
Explain the concept of a Requirements Traceability Matrix . Create a Requirement Traceability Matrix for web-based banking application.
Explain any five vulnerabilities from OWASP Top 10 and their preventive measures.
a. How does failing to sanitize output contribute to cross-site scripting ? b. How can improper input formatting lead to injection flaws?
What the role of code analysis tools in the early detection of security vulnerabilities. Compare static and dynamic code analysis tools with examples.
Discuss a case study on recent software vulnerabilities due to insecure coding and how they could have been prevented.
